cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (sequencing grade, Promega, Madison, WI)
enrichment method: further enriched using an offline immobilized metal affinity chromatography (IMAC) column
fragmentation method: HCD at 75% energy for iTRAQ quantification for Orbitrap Elite
instrument: nanoelectrospray into an Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer
labeling: differentially iTRAQ8plex labeled tyrosine phosphorylated peptides
